phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è l'ingresso per la torre Belforte, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH ling-GRES-so per la TOR-reh bel-FOR-teh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Salendo la via principale, a destra.
likely_response.pronunciation: sah-LEHN-doh LAH VEE-ah preen-chee-PAH-leh AH DEH-strah
likely_response.translation_en: Going up the main street, on the right.

responses.english: Going up the main street, on the right.
responses.phonetic: sah-LEHN-doh LAH VEE-ah preen-chee-PAH-leh AH DEH-strah
responses.local: Salendo la via principale, a destra.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si trova il porto naturale, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-veh see TRO-va il POR-toh na-too-RAH-leh, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: In fondo alla piazza, davanti a voi.
likely_response.pronunciation: EEN FOHN-doh AHL-lah pee-AHTS-tsah dah-VAHN-tee AH VOH-ee
likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the square, in front of you.

responses.english: At the end of the square, in front of you.
responses.phonetic: EEN FOHN-doh AHL-lah pee-AHTS-tsah dah-VAHN-tee AH VOH-ee
responses.local: In fondo alla piazza, davanti a voi.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che ora parte il prossimo battello, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ah keh OH-ra PAR-teh il PROS-see-mo bat-TEL-lo, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa l'ingresso al museo, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh COS-ta ling-GRES-so al moo-ZEH-oh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Scusi, ci sono bagni pubblici vicino alla piazza, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, chee SOH-noh BAH-nyee POOB-blee-chee vee-CHEE-no al-la PYAT-sa, per fah-VOH-reh
